steps.title: Identify the signal in context
steps.content: The passage presents "producing acclaimed works" as the means by which Gary Pak establishes his place in the literary tradition. This phrase signals positive achievement—something that would naturally make one's position secure and firm.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the signal
steps.content:
"Registered" here means expressed or showed outwardly — the motorman's dissatisfaction was visible in his manner. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — Bypassed: went around or avoided — implies the motorman ignored or circumvented something; unrelated to expressing a feeling. ✗
  • Choice B — Enrolled: signed up or joined — makes no sense in context; you cannot enroll discontent. ✗
  • Choice C — Valued: regarded as important — implies the motorman treasured his discontent, not that he displayed it. ✗
  • Choice D — Displayed: showed or expressed outwardly — the motorman's face or posture showed his unhappiness. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
